reviews.comment:
Es una porquería... Son muy lerdos para atender, y a veces solo funciona un solo surtidor. A veces te toca que te agarra el cambio de turno y chau, se perdió media hora. Hay muchísimo por mejorar

(Translated by Google)
It's a mess... They're incredibly slow, and sometimes only one pump is working. Sometimes you're caught by the shift change and that's it, half an hour is lost. There's so much room for improvement.
